me.ddayo.aris.luagen.CoroutineProvider.C.description: Internal use only. Result object yielded by an Aris coroutine step. It can represent either a wait condition or a break value returned to Aris.
Internal use only. Returns true when this coroutine wait step has completed and execution can continue.
Internal use only. Returns true when this coroutine result should stop the coroutine and return its value to Aris.
Internal use only. Returns the value carried by a coroutine break result.

me.ddayo.aris.luagen.CoroutineProvider.L.description: Internal use only. Aris-facing wrapper around a Kotlin coroutine sequence used by generated bindings.
Internal use only. Advances the coroutine sequence and returns the next coroutine result. If the sequence is finished, it returns a break result.

me.ddayo.aris.luagen.LuaEngine.LuaCodeTa.description: Task created from Aris source code and executed by the Aris engine scheduler.

me.ddayo.aris.luagen.LuaEngine.LuaTask.description: Base scheduled Aris task managed by the Aris engine.

me.ddayo.aris.luagen.LuaEngine.LuaTask:g.description: Returns the name assigned to this Aris task.
